cause_analysis.narrative: Build Up Therapeutics Massage & Bodywork churned on 2026-03-20 after 178 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 25-day silence starting 2026-03-20. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 167 times, but the client only replied 1. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.

messages.body: Subject: Hello BuildUp Therapeutics are you fully booked this week?\n\nBody: Final follow-up before I join a monastery (with ice cream) Hey BuildUp Therapeutics This is my final friendly ping before I disappear into the follow-up abyss. If you're still interested, I’d love to reconnect. If not, no hard feelings (I’ll j…

Subject: Hello BuildUp Therapeutics are you fully booked this week?\n\nBody: Hey BuildUp Therapeutics I called you today. You didn't pick up. I'm not hurt. (I'm a little hurt.) I'll assume you were either in a meeting, saving a cat from a tree, or just saw an unknown number and thought "absolutely not." All valid. Anyw…

Hey! Quick question   When someone searches for your service near them, does your business actually show up on Google?  Most local business owners don't realise they're losing new customers every month to competitors who rank higher - including on AI search tools like ChatGPT and Google AI.  We help fix that with AI- p…

Hey,  I'm Sheri from an AI Tech company, instead of discounts, we help salons and spas get new paying clients at full price every month without charging any commission. That way you don't have to give away your services cheaper. We don't do contracts too.   WE ARE OFFERING FREE TRIAL RIGHT NOW!  If you're open, I'd lov…
Request Closed

Good Morning Brittany,  How have you been?

Hey Brittany,  How have you been?  My name is Kanak and I am the Client Experience Specialist.    I've already been working on your account personally, and I'd love to connect with you to get your suggestions and feedback directly. I completely understand your frustration with the service, and I respect your decision i…
I completely understand your decision, and I respect it. Before we wrap things up, I'd love for you to take a quick look at the performance report we put together for you.
If something fell short, I want to know. Your feedback means a lot to us, and I'd genuinely like the chance to make it right.
Would you be open to a quick call so we can walk through the report together and hear your thoughts?
Also, I have shared with you the detailed performance report. You might have received an email from kanak.s@zoca.com to builduptherapeutics@gmail.com
I genuinely want to fix things for you, Brittany.

I also want to make sure you're seeing real value for every dollar you invest with us. If the ROI hasn't felt strong enough, let's talk about that openly. I'm confident we can find a way to deliver bigger results with a smarter approach, so you're getting more out of less.

Good Morning Brittany, Happy Wednesday!  We're halfway through the week already! Hope your books are looking good and your clients are leaving happy. Keep up the great work, and if there's anything I can help with, I'm just a text away.  Have a productive rest of the week!
